key.emilink.fill_search: Fill AE2 search with hovered item name (Alt: mod ID)
key.emilink.quick_fill_slot: Place hovered item into empty filter slot
emilink.configuration.title: EmiLink Config
emilink.config.general.debugMode.tooltip: Enable debug logging and debug chat messages
emilink.config.cache.cacheTTLMs.tooltip: AE network cache TTL in milliseconds (100-60000)
Negative cache (item not found) TTL in milliseconds (100-120000)
emilink.config.cache.batchFlushMs.toolti: How often pending AE queries are batched and sent to the server (200-10000)
emilink.config.bookmark_priority.bookmar: When encoding processing patterns via EMI recipe transfer, prioritize items from the EMI favorites bar over network-inventory-selected items
emilink.config.features.enableWrapBook.t: Wrap processing pattern output as written book
emilink.config.features.enableNetworkBad: Show AE network status corner badges on EMI item icons (default: off; green=in stock, yellow=craftable only)
emilink.config.features.networkBadgeStyl: Badge rendering style: 1 = bottom-right filled square, 2 = top-left hollow border
When wrap book is enabled, also place the original output item into an empty input slot
emilink.config.network.enableDebugPacket: Limit debug-related packets to 1 per tick to prevent congestion
